Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a dynamic string that represents the Git hash for the current version of a feature.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track which version of a feature is being used, ensuring players get the latest updates.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Records the timestamp when a dynamic string feature is flipped or changed.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows players to experience timely updates and changes in features based on when they were last modified.

Changed_Other.mechanism: Holds a fast-access string that indicates the Git hash for a feature's version.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by quickly identifying the version of a feature, enhancing the player experience with smoother updates.
